source_docs.title: ISSAAC-seq enables sensitive and flexible multimodal profiling of chromatin accessibility and gene expression in single cells

oligos.name: ME_S5
oligos.role: Tn5 transposon adapter, top strand (Nextera Read 1 / s5 + mosaic end)
oligos.notes: Nextera Read 1 (s5) handle TCGTCGGCAGCGTC + 19-bp mosaic end (ME) AGATGTGTATAAGAGACAG. Annealed to ME_Bottom to form S5_adaptor. Dissolved at 100 uM; canonical Nextera/scg_lib_structs sequence.

oligos.name: ME_S7
oligos.role: Tn5 transposon adapter, top strand (Nextera Read 2 / s7 + mosaic end)
oligos.notes: Nextera Read 2 (s7) handle GTCTCGTGGGCTCGG + mosaic end AGATGTGTATAAGAGACAG. Annealed to ME_Bottom to form S7_adaptor.

oligos.name: ME_Bottom
oligos.role: Tn5 mosaic-end bottom (blocking) strand
oligos.notes: 5'-phosphorylated. Reverse complement of the 19-bp mosaic end; shared bottom strand of both S5 and S7 adaptors.

oligos.name: S5_adaptor
oligos.role: Annealed Tn5 s5 adapter duplex
oligos.notes: 25 ul ME_S5 (100 uM) + 25 ul ME_Bottom (100 uM) annealed 98C->16C -> S5_adaptor (50 uM); diluted to 20 uM for Tn5 loading.

oligos.name: S7_adaptor
oligos.role: Annealed Tn5 s7 adapter duplex
oligos.notes: ME_S7 + ME_Bottom annealed to 50 uM, diluted to 20 uM.

oligos.name: Tn5-S5/S7 transposome
oligos.role: Heterodimeric Tn5 for open-chromatin (ATAC) tagmentation
oligos.notes: 12 ul S5_adaptor (20uM) + 12 ul S7_adaptor (20uM) + 48 ul Tn5 + 88 ul coupling buffer, RT 1 h. Used for chromatin tagmentation (both plate and droplet).

oligos.name: Tn5-S5/S5 homodimer
oligos.role: Homodimeric Tn5 for RNA-DNA-hybrid tagmentation (droplet workflow)
oligos.notes: 24 ul S5_adaptor (20uM) + 48 ul Tn5 + 88 ul coupling buffer. Droplet workflow uses Tn5-S5/S5 to add a Nextera Read-1 (s5) handle to the cDNA so the 10x bead can barcode it. (Plate workflow uses Tn5-S7/S7 instead.)

oligos.name: Tn5-S7/S7 homodimer
oligos.role: Homodimeric Tn5 for RNA-DNA-hybrid tagmentation (plate/FACS workflow)
oligos.notes: Plate-based analogue of Tn5-S5/S5; listed for completeness (not used in the droplet workflow).

oligos.name: TruseqR2_oligo_dT
oligos.role: In-situ RT primer (droplet): partial TruSeq Read 2 + 10-bp UMI + poly-dT
oligos.notes: Used at 2 uM in the droplet RT reaction. Reverse-transcribes mRNA; the 10-bp UMI is read as the first 10 bp of Read 2. Exact oligo listing is in the paper's Supplementary Table 4 (not provided); handle modules shown are canonical TruSeq. 3' anchor (VN) omitted from the ACGTN string.

oligos.name: TruseqR1_oligo_dT
oligos.role: In-situ RT primer (plate/FACS): partial TruSeq Read 1 + 10-bp UMI + poly-dT
oligos.notes: Plate-workflow RT primer (2 uM). Listed for completeness; the droplet workflow uses TruseqR2_oligo_dT.

oligos.name: 10x Chromium Single-Cell ATAC gel-bead oligo (v1.1)
oligos.role: Droplet cell barcode: P5 + 16-bp 10x cell barcode + Nextera Read 1

components.name: Nextera Read 1 (s5)
components.role: primes onto s5-tagged ATAC/RNA molecules to transfer the barcode

oligos.notes: Provided on the 10x Next GEM Single Cell ATAC v1.1 gel bead; the in-house Tn5 uses the same Nextera Read-1 (s5) handle so both ATAC and RNA molecules are barcoded. Exact 16-bp barcode whitelist is the 10x scATAC list.

oligos.name: Illumina P5 primer
oligos.role: Library PCR primer (P5 side)
oligos.notes: Used at 10 uM in droplet pre-amplification and in both final ATAC and RNA amplifications (anneals to the 10x P5/cell-barcode end).

oligos.name: Illumina P7 primer
oligos.role: Library PCR primer (P7 side, plate workflow)
oligos.notes: Used in the plate-based final amplification with RNA_plate_S5xx / ATAC_plate_S5xx. Listed for completeness.

oligos.name: ATAC_droplet_N7xx
oligos.role: Droplet ATAC library index primer: P7 + i7 sample index + Nextera Read 2

components.name: Nextera Read 2 (s7)
components.role: anneals to the s7 end of ATAC fragments

oligos.notes: Custom primer replacing 10x SI-PCR primer B / Single Index N. Used at 10 uM in droplet pre-amplification and final ATAC amplification. Exact 8-bp index in Supplementary Table 4 (not provided).

oligos.name: RNA_droplet_N7xx
oligos.role: Droplet RNA library index primer: P7 + i7 sample index + partial TruSeq Read 2

components.name: TruSeq Read 2 handle
components.role: anneals to the TruSeq-R2/UMI end of cDNA molecules

oligos.notes: Custom primer; used at 10 uM in droplet pre-amplification and final RNA amplification. Same sample index space as ATAC_droplet_N7xx but with the TruSeq (not Nextera) handle. Exact index in Supplementary Table 4 (not provided).

oligos.name: N7xx primer
oligos.role: Nextera i7 well-index primer (plate lysis pre-amplification)
oligos.notes: 10 uM in plate lysis buffer; adds a per-well i7 barcode. Plate-workflow oligo, listed for completeness.

oligos.name: Truseq_S5_short
oligos.role: Plate lysis primer (partial TruSeq Read 1 handle)
oligos.notes: 10 uM in plate lysis buffer (RNA arm). Handle shown is canonical partial TruSeq R1; exact oligo in Supplementary Table 4. Plate-workflow only.

oligos.name: Nextra_S5_short
oligos.role: Plate lysis primer (partial Nextera Read 1 handle)
oligos.notes: 10 uM in plate lysis buffer (ATAC arm). Nextera Read-1 (s5) handle. Plate-workflow only.

oligos.name: RNA_plate_S5xx
oligos.role: Plate RNA final-library index primer (P5 + i5 sample index + partial TruSeq R1)
oligos.notes: Plate-workflow final amplification with Illumina P7. Modular reconstruction; exact index sequence in Supplementary Table 4 (not provided).

oligos.name: ATAC_plate_S5xx
oligos.role: Plate ATAC final-library index primer (P5 + i5 sample index + Nextera R1)
oligos.notes: Plate-workflow final amplification with Illumina P7. Modular reconstruction; exact index in Supplementary Table 4 (not provided).

final_library.annotated_library_sequence: 5'- AATGATACGGCGACCACCGAGATCTACAC [CELL_BARCODE:16] TCGTCGGCAGCGTC AGATGTGTATAAGAGACAG [CDNA] TTTTTTTTTTTTTTTTTTTT [UMI:10] AGATCGGAAGAGCACACGTCTGAACTCCAGTCAC [SAMPLE_INDEX:8] ATCTCGTATGCCGTCTTCTGCTTG -3'

strands.source_html: 5'- AATGATACGGCGACCACCGAGATCTACAC[CELL_BARCODE:16]TCGTCGGCAGCGTCAGATGTGTATAAGAGACAG[GENOMIC]CTGTCTCTTATACACATCTCCGAGCCCACGAGAC[SAMPLE_INDEX:8]ATCTCGTATGCCGTCTTCTGCTTG -3'   (s5-tagged/barcoded end + s7 end; standard 10x scATAC read layout)
strands.source_sequence: 5'- AATGATACGGCGACCACCGAGATCTACAC[CELL_BARCODE:16]TCGTCGGCAGCGTCAGATGTGTATAAGAGACAG[GENOMIC]CTGTCTCTTATACACATCTCCGAGCCCACGAGAC[SAMPLE_INDEX:8]ATCTCGTATGCCGTCTTCTGCTTG -3'   (s5-tagged/barcoded end + s7 end; standard 10x scATAC read layout)

annotation_lines: [CELL_BARCODE:16]              = 10x Chromium cell barcode (sequenced as i5 / Index 2)
AGATGTGTATAAGAGACAG            = mosaic end (ME), added by Tn5-S5/S5 to the cDNA
TTTTTTTTTTTTTTTTTTTT           = poly(dA/dT) from the RT primer (variable length)

library_generation.title: Chromatin tagmentation (Tn5-S5/S7)
library_generation.summary: Tn5-S5/S7 tagments open chromatin in situ, inserting Nextera s5 and s7 mosaic-end adapters.
library_generation.note: Nuclei incubated with Tn5-S5/S7 at 30 C, 30 min (30 C is critical for RNA-library quality). Each Tn5 insertion leaves a 9-bp gap; fragments end up flanked by s5 and s7.
library_generation.product:
5'- TCGTCGGCAGCGTC AGATGTGTATAAGAGACAG [GENOMIC] CTGTCTCTTATACACATCT CCGAGCCCACGAGAC -3'
           (s5)            (ME)          insert         (ME rev)        (s7 rev)

library_generation.title: In-situ reverse transcription
library_generation.summary: TruseqR2_oligo_dT primes mRNA poly(A); Maxima H- RT makes first-strand cDNA carrying a TruSeq-R2 handle + 10-bp UMI.
library_generation.note: Performed inside intact nuclei with 12% PEG-8000. The RT primer adds a partial TruSeq Read 2 adapter and a 10-bp UMI to every cDNA.

library_generation.title: RNA-DNA hybrid tagmentation (Tn5-S5/S5)
library_generation.summary: Tn5-S5/S5 homodimer tags the mRNA:cDNA hybrid, adding a Nextera Read-1 (s5) handle to the cDNA.
library_generation.note: Droplet workflow uses the S5/S5 homodimer so the cDNA gains the same Nextera Read-1 handle as ATAC fragments, enabling 10x bead barcoding.
library_generation.product:
5'- TCGTCGGCAGCGTC AGATGTGTATAAGAGACAG [CDNA] TTTTTTTTTT [UMI:10] GTGACTGGAGTTCAGACGTGTGCTCTTCCGATCT -3'
           (s5)            (ME)         cDNA    poly-dT    (UMI)          (TruSeq R2)

library_generation.title: Exonuclease I digestion and gap fill-in
library_generation.summary: Thermolabile Exo I removes unincorporated primers and Maxima H- fills the 9-bp Tn5 gaps.
library_generation.note: 37 C, 15 min. Produces intact, gap-repaired double-stranded ATAC and RNA-DNA molecules ready for capture.
library_generation.product: double-stranded, gap-filled ATAC and RNA molecules, each bearing an s5 (Nextera Read 1) end available for barcoding.

library_generation.title: GEM generation and 10x barcoding
library_generation.summary: Nuclei are partitioned on the 10x Chromium Next GEM Single-Cell ATAC v1.1 chip; the gel-bead oligo adds P5 + a 16-bp cell barcode via the Nextera Read-1 (s5) end.
library_generation.note: 10x transposition step is omitted (Tn5 already applied in situ). Linear barcoding within GEMs transfers the same cell barcode to both ATAC and RNA molecules; 12 thermal cycles.
library_generation.product:
5'- AATGATACGGCGACCACCGAGATCTACAC [CELL_BARCODE:16] TCGTCGGCAGCGTC AGATGTGTATAAGAGACAG [CDNA or GENOMIC] ... -3'
           (P5)                     (10x CB)          (s5)            (ME)

library_generation.title: Pre-amplification PCR
library_generation.summary: Pooled barcoded products are pre-amplified with Illumina P5 + ATAC_droplet_N7xx + RNA_droplet_N7xx (7 cycles).
library_generation.note: P5 anneals to the barcode/P5 end; the two N7xx primers extend both the s7 (ATAC) and TruSeq-R2 (RNA) ends. Reaction then split for separate purification (ATAC 1.0x, RNA 0.8x beads).
library_generation.product: amplified ATAC molecules (P5-CB-s5...s7-i7-P7) and RNA molecules (P5-CB-s5-ME-cDNA-UMI-TruSeqR2-i7-P7) in one pool.

library_generation.title: Final ATAC and RNA library amplification
library_generation.summary: Split libraries are amplified separately: ATAC with P5 + ATAC_droplet_N7xx; RNA with P5 + RNA_droplet_N7xx, adding the i7 sample index and P7 (7 cycles).
library_generation.note: Yields two Illumina-ready libraries. RNA broad peak ~250-1000 bp; ATAC shows a nucleosomal ladder ~200-1000 bp.

library_sequencing.note: RNA library reads the cDNA insert; ATAC library reads the genomic insert. Primer anneals at the s5/mosaic-end (Nextera Read 1) handle and extends into the insert.

library_sequencing.primer: i7 index sequencing primer (anneals to the read-2 handle)
library_sequencing.note: 8-bp sample index from RNA_droplet_N7xx (RNA) or ATAC_droplet_N7xx (ATAC); distinguishes samples and modality. Read from the P7-proximal read-2 handle toward P7.

library_sequencing.primer: i5 index primer (anneals to the Nextera Read 1 / s5 handle)
library_sequencing.note: 16-bp 10x Chromium cell barcode, read toward P5. For RNA, Index 2 is concatenated with the first 10 bp of Read 2 to form the cell-barcode+UMI; for ATAC, it is the Cell Ranger ATAC cell barcode.

RNA library: first 10 bp = UMI, then poly-T, then cDNA reverse complement. ATAC library: reads the genomic insert from the s7 end with the Nextera Read 2 primer. Primer anneals to the top-strand TruSeq handle and extends leftward into the UMI.

title: ISSAAC-seq (droplet)
description: ISSAAC-seq (in situ sequencing hetero RNA–DNA-hybrid, SHERRY, after ATAC-seq) is a droplet-based single-nucleus multi-omics assay that jointly profiles chromatin accessibility (ATAC) and gene expression (RNA) from the same nucleus. Open chromatin is tagged in situ by a Tn5-S5/S7 transposome (Nextera mosaic-end adapters); mRNA is reverse-transcribed in the nucleus with a poly-dT primer carrying a partial TruSeq adapter and a 10-bp UMI; a Tn5-S5/S5 homodimer then tags the RNA–DNA hybrid to add a Nextera handle to the cDNA. Nuclei are captured on the 10x Chromium Single-Cell ATAC platform, which adds a 16-bp cell barcode (Nextera Read-1 bead), and the pre-amplified pool is split and amplified into separate ATAC and RNA Illumina libraries. Reads capture: genomic insert (ATAC) or cDNA (RNA) plus a 16-bp 10x cell barcode (i5) and a 10-bp UMI (first 10 bp of the RNA Read 2).

reference.label: ISSAAC-seq enables sensitive and flexible multimodal profiling of chromatin accessibility and gene expression in single cells

original_publication.title: ISSAAC-seq enables sensitive and flexible multimodal profiling of chromatin accessibility and gene expression in single cells

throughput.summary: High-throughput droplet workflow on 10x Chromium; >10,000 nuclei recovered from adult mouse cortex (10,378 passed QC). Observed droplet doublet rate ~8.8% (vs ~4.2% FACS).
throughput.cells: Thousands to tens of thousands of nuclei per 10x Chromium run (targeted loading 5,000-10,000 nuclei).
throughput.rna: Several thousand UMIs and detected genes per nucleus; medians >17,000 total UMIs and >4,000 genes at optimal 30 C tagging (E14 mESC).
throughput.dna: Tens of thousands of unique nuclear reads in peaks per nucleus; median ~16,619 ATAC reads in peaks (droplet, mouse cortex).

publication.statistical_model: Poisson (MACS2 model-based ATAC peak calling); binomial tests for de novo motif enrichment, hypergeometric tests for GO. No explicit generative count model stated for UMIs (analyzed with Seurat/Signac/STARsolo).

other.label: Droplet cell capture
other.value: 10x Chromium Next GEM Single-Cell ATAC Library & Gel Bead Kit v1.1, with the transposition step omitted and custom index primers (replacing SI-PCR primer B / Single Index N Set A)

other.label: Key optimization
other.value: Chromatin tagging at 30 C (not 37 C) markedly improves RNA-seq library quality without harming ATAC data

other.label: Tn5 source
other.value: Fapon Biotech NK001 (0.5 ug/ul); adapters assembled in-house (S5_adaptor / S7_adaptor)

other.label: Method basis
other.value: Combines SHERRY (RNA/DNA-hybrid tagmentation) with 10x droplet scATAC; any bead with a Nextera Read-1 sequence works (10x, Bio-Rad, HyDrop)

other.label: Oligo sequence source
other.value: Exact barcode/index/primer sequences are in the paper's Supplementary Table 4 (not included in the provided documents); index/barcode/UMI regions are shown here as placeholder tokens.

data_processing.summary: FastQ files are generated with bcl2fastq and demultiplexed with deML, then preprocessed per modality: the droplet ATAC library (Read 1 + Read 2 + Index 2) is processed with Cell Ranger ATAC, while for RNA the 16-bp cell barcode (Index 2) and the first 10 bp of Read 2 are concatenated into a cell-barcode+UMI FastQ and, together with Read 1, quantified into a gene-expression matrix by STARsolo. Downstream RNA clustering/annotation uses Seurat (+Scanpy), ATAC clustering uses Signac, and modality-specific peaks are called with MACS2.
data_processing.statistical_model: Poisson (MACS2 model-based peak calling); binomial tests for de novo motif enrichment (HOMER)
